query: SELECT config_key, config_value, label, category, is_active FROM game_config WHERE config_key LIKE '%divine%' OR config_key LIKE '%action_point%' OR category = 'divine' ORDER BY category, config_key;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT config_key, config_value, label, category, is_active FROM game_config WHERE config_key LIKE '%divine%' OR config_key LIKE '%action_point%' OR category = 'divine' ORDER BY category, config_key;
